title: tragacantha biovulata
intro: Tragacantha biovulata, also known as the Lesser Burnet or Burnet Saxifrage, is a flowering plant in the saxifrage family. This plant is known to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its roots, which are used to treat a variety of health issues, including rheumatism and digestive problems. The health benefits of Tragacantha biovulata include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of arthritis, reduce fever, and soothe digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Tragacantha biovulata roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that are used to treat a range of health conditions.
